component.name: Lantern
component.summary: Author Markdown slide decks with live preview

description.p: Lantern is a calm Markdown slide authoring app for GNOME. Write a deck in plain Markdown, watch it render live in the same window, and let the file on disk stay the source of truth.

Slides are powered by the Marp ecosystem, so anything you can express in Marp Markdown — themes, directives, fragments — will render. Lantern handles the editor, the preview pane, and the file lifecycle so you can keep your attention on the words.

ul.li: Side-by-side editor and live preview, or focus mode for either
IBM Plex Mono typography out of the box
Automatic save while you type — no save button to remember
Follows the system light / dark preference

description.p: First cut: editor, preview, autosave, light/dark, layout toggle.
